description: Expected validation state for the uk_cambridge_apa7 sample project (Cambridge PhD, APA 7, NLP/CS)
notes: Cambridge PhD thesis in NLP/Computer Science, APA 7. Stress-tests: 2 supervisors + 3-person examining committee, Declaration section, 8 BibTeX entries across 5 types (article, book, inproceedings, techreport, misc), mathematical notation in methodology (inline and display math), Nomenclature section, Appendix with hyperparameter tables, 8 citation blocks across 4 sections, cross-lingual NLP context. Uses A4 paper with 40mm left margin (Cambridge binding requirement).
